wikibase-randomitem: A label for a link title in the sidebar. Takes the user to a random item.
wikibase-randomitem-url:
{{Ignored}}
A link to a random item.
wikibase-queryservice: A label for a link title in the sidebar. Takes the user to the query service.
wikibase-queryservice-url:
{{Ignored}}
A URL to the Query Service.
data-access: Title for the link to the data access page.
gadget-section-wikidata: Section heading on the gadgets tab in the preferences. Section contains tools designed for Wikidata.
gadget-section-lexemes: Section heading on the gadgets tab in the preferences. Section contains tools for lexicographical data.
gadget-section-general: Section heading on the gadgets tab in the preferences. Section contains tools not specific to Wikidata.
gadget-section-admin-gadgets: Section heading on the gadgets tab in the preferences. Section contains tools designed for admins.
tag-client-automatic-update: The text shown for the "client-automatic-update" change tag.
tag-client-automatic-update-description: The description for the "client-automatic-update" change tag.
tag-client-linkitem-change: The text shown for the "client-linkitem-change" change tag.
tag-client-linkitem-change-description: The description for the "client-linkitem-change" change tag.
tag-data-bridge: The text shown for the "data-bridge" change tag.
tag-termbox: The text shown for the "termbox" change tag.
tag-termbox-description: The description for the "termbox" change tag.
tag-wikidata-ui: The text shown for the "wikidata-ui" change tag.
tag-wikidata-ui-description: The description for the "wikidata-ui" change tag.
wikiprojects-sidebar-wikiproject-astrono:
The name of [[d:Special:MyLanguage/Wikidata:WikiProject Astronomy|WikiProject Astronomy]] to use in the Related WikiProjects sidebar section.
See also: {{msg-mw|wikibase-wikiprojects-sidebar-section}}
